# This file was autogenerated by:
# Arduino_Core_STM32\cmake\scripts\cmake_easy_setup.py
# Use it in your CMake configuration by `include()`'ing it.
# You can also copy it in your sketch's folder and edit it to fit your project.

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.21)

# STEP 1: set up bases of environment
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
set(BOARDNAME "NUCLEO_F429ZI")

list(APPEND CMAKE_MODULE_PATH ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/Arduino_Core_STM32/cmake)
set(CMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE toolchain)


# This block can be removed when using this file as the sketch's CMakeLists.txt
if (NOT ${CMAKE_PARENT_LIST_FILE} STREQUAL ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_FILE})
    # When imported from the main CMakeLists.txt, it should stop here
    # not to interfere with the true build config.
    return()
endif()

project(ARDUINO_NUCLEO_F429ZI)

# Add user lib directory
LINK_DIRECTORIES(${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/lib)

# STEP 2: configure the build
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Uncomment and pick the relevant value for each keyword!
# The first value listed is the default (when the feature is supported by the board)
# This means that leaving everything commented out yields the default config
include(set_board)
set_board("${BOARDNAME}"
  # SERIAL generic / disabled / none
  # USB none / CDCgen / CDC / HID
  # XUSB FS / HS / HSFS
  # VIRTIO disable / generic / enabled
  # BOOTLOADER dfuo / dfu2 / hid
)

include(overall_settings)
overall_settings(
  # STANDARD_LIBC
  PRINTF_FLOAT
  # SCANF_FLOAT
  # DEBUG_SYMBOLS
  # LTO
  # NO_RELATIVE_MACRO
  # UNDEF_NDEBUG
  OPTIMIZATION "0"
  # BUILD_OPT ./build.opt
  # DISABLE_HAL_MODULES ADC I2C RTC SPI TIM DAC EXTI ETH SD QSPI
  # CORE_CALLBACK
)

# STEP 2bis: include directories
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
include_directories(
    ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/Temperature_LM75_Derived/src
    ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/Accelerometer_MMA7660
    ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/WiFiEspAT/src
    ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/STM32FreeRTOS/src
    ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/SD/src
    ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/U8g2_Arduino/src
    ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/STM32_CAN
    ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/C12832
    )

    U8g2_Arduino/src/clib/u8x8_message.c
    U8g2_Arduino/src/clib/u8x8_selection_list.c

    U8g2_Arduino/src/clib/u8x8_u8toa.c
    U8g2_Arduino/src/U8g2lib.cpp
    U8g2_Arduino/src/U8x8lib.cpp
)

target_compile_definitions(
    U8g2_Arduino
    PUBLIC
    ARDUINO
)

target_link_libraries(
    U8g2_Arduino
    SPI
    Wire
)

add_library(
    C12832 STATIC
    C12832/C12832.cpp
)

target_link_libraries(
    C12832
    U8g2_Arduino
    STM32FreeRTOS
)

add_library(
    Temperature_LM75_Derived STATIC
    Temperature_LM75_Derived/src/Temperature_LM75_Derived.cpp
)

target_link_libraries(
    Temperature_LM75_Derived
    Wire
)

add_library(
    Accelerometer_MMA7660 STATIC
    Accelerometer_MMA7660/MMA7660.cpp
)

target_link_libraries(
    Accelerometer_MMA7660
    Wire
)

include_directories(
    ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/STM32Ethernet/src
    ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/LwIP/src
    )

add_library(
    WiFiEspAT STATIC
    WiFiEspAT/src/utility/EspAtDrv.cpp
    WiFiEspAT/src/utility/EspAtDrvLogging.cpp
    WiFiEspAT/src/WiFi.cpp
    WiFiEspAT/src/WiFiClient.cpp
    WiFiEspAT/src/WiFiEspAtBuffManager.cpp
    WiFiEspAT/src/WiFiEspAtBuffStream.cpp
    WiFiEspAT/src/WiFiServer.cpp
    WiFiEspAT/src/WiFiSSLClient.cpp
    WiFiEspAT/src/WiFiUdp.cpp
)

target_link_libraries(WiFiEspAT PUBLIC
  base_config
)

add_library(
    SD STATIC
    SD/src/File.cpp
    SD/src/SD.cpp
    SD/src/utility/Sd2Card.cpp
    SD/src/utility/SdFile.cpp
    SD/src/utility/SdVolume.cpp
)

target_link_libraries(SD PUBLIC
  base_config
  SPI
)

add_library(
    STM32FreeRTOS STATIC
    STM32FreeRTOS/src/cmsis_os.c
    STM32FreeRTOS/src/FreeRTOS/Source/croutine.c
    STM32FreeRTOS/src/FreeRTOS/Source/event_groups.c
    STM32FreeRTOS/src/FreeRTOS/Source/list.c
    STM32FreeRTOS/src/FreeRTOS/Source/queue.c
    STM32FreeRTOS/src/FreeRTOS/Source/stream_buffer.c
    STM32FreeRTOS/src/FreeRTOS/Source/tasks.c
    STM32FreeRTOS/src/FreeRTOS/Source/timers.c
    STM32FreeRTOS/src/heap.c
    STM32FreeRTOS/src/mpu_wrappers.c
    STM32FreeRTOS/src/port.c
    STM32FreeRTOS/src/portasm.c
    STM32FreeRTOS/src/STM32FreeRTOS.c
)

target_link_libraries(STM32FreeRTOS PUBLIC
  base_config
)

add_library(
    STM32_CAN STATIC
    STM32_CAN/STM32_CAN.cpp
)

target_link_libraries(STM32_CAN PUBLIC
  base_config
)

# STEP 3: configure your sketch
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
include(external_library)
# Cannot tell the dependencies of the library ahead-of-time
# Please write them in using the DEPENDS ... clause
# The same directives apply as for `build_sketch()` just below.
external_library(PATH "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/LwIP")
external_library(PATH "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/STM32Ethernet" DEPENDS LwiP)

include_directories(
    include
    )

# Check for user source files in src directory
FILE(GLOB_RECURSE sources CONFIGURE_DEPENDS 
    ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/src/*.c
    ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/src/*.cpp
)

include(build_sketch)

build_sketch(TARGET ARDUINO_NUCLEO_F429ZI
    SOURCES
    ${sources}
    # Uncomment the lines below to bind libraries to your sketch
    # Legitimate names after the DEPENDS keywords are:
    # - libraries declared with external_library
    # - libraries from the libraries/ folder of Arduino_Core_STM32

    DEPENDS
    IHM
    STM32_CAN
    STM32FreeRTOS
    STM32Ethernet
    LwIP
    SD
    Wire
    SPI
    # USBDevice
    # VirtIO
    U8g2_Arduino
    C12832
    Temperature_LM75_Derived
    Accelerometer_MMA7660
    WiFiEspAT
)

# STEP 4: optional features
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

include(insights)
insights(TARGET ARDUINO_NUCLEO_F429ZI
  # DIRECT_INCLUDES
  # TRANSITIVE_INCLUDES
  # SYMBOLS
  # ARCHIVES
  # LOGIC_STRUCTURE
)
